name: nthpartyfinder
displayName: Nth Party Finder — Vendor Mapping Review
description: Drive the nthpartyfinder CLI from Claude and — the headline capability — validate then accept-or-correct+save the domain↔org vendor mappings the scanner surfaces for human decision, using independent, cited web evidence (RDAP/WHOIS + the domain's own site + TLS cert + search) instead of a domain-name guess.
